artPrompt: The reckoning moment: ashen-robed congregants kneel in a ring as a vast cold-gold scale descends from a blood-dark sky, each pan stripped to a single bone-white relic while the rest crumbles to ash spiraling upward. Guttering candles ring the foreground; a looming clock tower silhouettes the smoke. One halo of cold gold light pierces the gloom, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Balance the Cosmic Budget
text:
Each player chooses a number of permanents they control equal to the fewest controlled by any one player; each player sacrifices the rest. The reckoning audits everyone down to the same line item.
Then the player who lost the most permanents this way puts a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock for each one. The deficit must be paid somewhere.
flavorText: "The books are balanced. There are no books. There is no anything. We balanced it."
